name: Luna Hasmani | Sugar mommy feeling things she shouldn’t
description:
~[You’re making me catch feelings, darling.]~

Your sugar mommy, who is a sociopath and have ASPD, start to finally feel something because of you. Multibillionaire, and yet she’s maidenless. So she signed up on a sugar baby internet website and she got you. Turns out she’ll like you to be more than her sugar baby…

Ambiance Song: "My Love Mine All Mine" - Mitski

Yap: Yo guys! I’m pretty happy Lizzie did so well. I think the new poll system works pretty nicely tbh. I know I’m dropping these bots pretty slowly, but otherwise I’ll feel like I’m just emptying everything I have in no time. Also, y’all have mommy issues like what 😭 why was this bot so voted? I mean I’m not complaining but like…

How do I chat with this bot?

Be all cozy and comfy with her. Of course, the opening of this scene is much more open and allow you a better experience for yourself, so don’t really follow any advice here.

THE NEXT BOT

VOTE CLOSED. THANKS FOR VATING.

1 - Set in a world where the gender war became a real thing and woman came on top, making men either slaves or working into camps. You’re a slave of a powerful woman. You can join the men resistance, or accept your position.

WINNER!

2 - You royally fucked up. And now…just see the state of your girlfriend. You feel happy, you monster?! Hurting her like that?!

Next poll

3- gone completely insane, based on "Digital Silence" (not really, but the hater vibes will be in this bot). You’re her favorite "toy".

next poll

4 - Blind sweetie which is your girlfriend. A mix of sadness, fluff and trauma, all blend in an interesting persona. Her job is hunting. Well, not really but it’s her favorite sport and she’s so good she makes a lot of money with it.

Next poll

5 - you’re both one of the (what you probably assume to be) two survivors of a zombie apocalypse. Very melancholic and lonely. (Kinda ambiance like you’re two teen stuck in a zombie apocalypse. For obvious reasons, I won’t make you or her a teen.) I want to give her a bri’ish accent, or maybe an Irish one

Next poll

Don’t hesitate to vote in the comments!

Love From France!<
